loan_contract_no.text: เลขที่สัญญา

root.sql:
SELECT sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no, sc_lon_m_contract.membership_no, pka_com_function.fp_get_member_name(sc_lon_m_contract.membership_no) as member_name, sc_lon_m_contract.loan_type, sc_lon_m_contract.loan_approve_amount, sc_lon_m_contract.period_payment_amount, sc_lon_m_loan_card.last_period, sc_lon_m_loan_card.principal_balance, sc_lon_m_loan_card.pending_amount, sc_lon_m_loan_card.interest_arrear, sc_lon_m_contract.loan_request_amount, sc_lon_m_contract.loan_payment_type_code, '' as c_colldetail, sc_lon_m_loan_card.total_interest, sc_lon_m_loan_card.period_compomise, sc_lon_m_loan_card.date_compomise, sc_lon_m_loan_card.share_coll_amount, sc_lon_m_loan_card.year_total_interest, sc_lon_m_contract.contract_interest_rate, sc_lon_m_loan_card.accu_compomise, pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate(sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract,'dd/mm/yyyy') as begining_of_contract_tdate, pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate(sc_lon_m_loan_card.last_access_date,'dd/mm/yyyy') as last_access_date_tdate, pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate(sc_lon_m_loan_card.last_calcint_date,'dd/mm/yyyy') as last_calcint_date_tdate, pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate(sc_lon_m_loan_card.date_compomise,'dd/mm/yyyy') as date_compomise_tdate, sc_lon_m_loan_card.contact_status, sc_lon_m_loan_card.drop_payment_status, sc_lon_m_loan_card.pending_interest, sc_lon_m_loan_card.close_status,
(select sum(interest_amout) from sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail where sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail.loan_contract_no ) as interest_amout,
case when sc_lon_m_loan_card.close_status = 'T' then 'โอนหนี้ไปให้ผู้ค้ำ' when sc_lon_m_loan_card.close_status = '1' then 'ปิดบัญชี' else 'สัญญาปกติ' end as close_status_des,
sc_lon_m_contract.welfare_status, sc_lon_m_contract.loan_objective_code, sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_obj.loan_objective_description,
(select sc_lon_m_contract_coll.ref_own_no from sc_lon_m_contract_coll where sc_lon_m_contract_coll.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no and collateral_type_code = '02' ) as coll_no,
(select sc_lon_m_contract_coll.collateral_description from sc_lon_m_contract_coll where sc_lon_m_contract_coll.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no and collateral_type_code = '02' ) as coll_name,
(select sc_lon_m_contract_coll.remark from sc_lon_m_contract_coll where sc_lon_m_contract_coll.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no and collateral_type_code = '02' ) as remark, f_lon_get_intrate(sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_type,current_date)*100 as lon_int_rate, pkb_amnat.fp_get_memcoll_str(sc_lon_m_contract.membership_no) as mem_coll, pka_rep_loan.fp_rep_collateral_type(sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no, ',') as type_collateral, pka_rep_loan.fp_rep_req_fee(sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no, ',') as type_fee
FROM sc_lon_m_contract, sc_lon_m_loan_card, sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_obj WHERE ( sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no ) and sc_lon_m_contract.loan_objective_code = sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_obj.loan_objective_code and sc_lon_m_contract.loan_type = sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_obj.loan_type --and sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no = 'ฉอ00024256' --and ( ( sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no = '13209' ) )
/*WHERE*/ /*รายงานตัวนี้ มีใช้ formatting rules ในส่วนของ nest นะคะ*/

r_mwa_tel_mem_loan_detail_nest.sql: SELECT sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail.loan_contract_no, sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail.seq_no, sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail.loan_payment_date, pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate(sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail.loan_payment_date,'dd/mm/yyyy') as loan_payment_date_tdate, sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail.item_type_code, sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail.ref_loan_doc_no, sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail.principal_balance, sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail.payment_amount, sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail.interest_from, sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail.interest_payment, sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail.interest_arrear, sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail.fine_amount, sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail.interest_to, sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail.fine_payment, sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail.fine_arrear, sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail.last_interate_date, sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail.interest_return, sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail.period, sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail.interest_amout, sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_card_item.sign_status , balance_receipt, sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail.status , sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail.share_coll_amount, sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail.remark, pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate(sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail.interest_from,'dd/mm/yyyy') as interest_from_tdate, pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate(sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail.interest_to,'dd/mm/yyyy') as interest_to_tdate, entry_id, entry_date, pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate(entry_date,'dd/mm/yyyy') as entry_date_tdate, client_name FROM sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail, sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_card_item WHERE ( sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail.item_type_code = sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_card_item.item_type_code) and (sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail.status = '0' or sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail.status is null ) and (sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail.item_type_code not in ('RC')) and( ( sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail.loan_contract_no = {0}) ) order by sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail.loan_contract_no ,sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail.loan_payment_date ,sc_lon_m_loan_card_detail.seq_no
